description: Docket provides AI marketing and sales agents for B2B revenue teams, focused on engaging website visitors, answering product questions from approved knowledge, qualifying intent, and syncing context into CRM workflows. Its site describes product capabilities and third-party integrations, but the public website does not document a callable developer API or CLI for Docket itself.
summary: docket.io exposes marketing website content and integration-partner pages, but I could not find any public developer integration surface for Docket itself such as an HTTP API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI.
